reasoning: The question asks if the US House of Representatives will censure, expel, or reprimand any of its members before April 1, 2026. Multiple credible sources confirm that on March 6, 2025, the US House of Representatives passed a resolution (H.Res.189) censuring Representative Al Green (D-TX). The resolution passed by a vote of 224 to 198. This event unequivocally meets the resolution criteria ("passes a resolution censuring, expelling or reprimanding a sitting Representative"). The community prediction of 27% on March 19, 2026 is extremely misguided and likely the result of stale forecasts or participants failing to realize the event had already occurred in March 2025. My probability is updated to 0.98.
